export function detectCountry(lat, lng) {
  var matches = EMERGENCY_DB.filter(function (c) {
    return c.code !== 'EU' && lat >= c.bbox[0] && lng >= c.bbox[1] && lat <= c.bbox[2] && lng <= c.bbox[3];
  });
  if (matches.length === 0) {
    return EMERGENCY_DB[EMERGENCY_DB.length - 1];
  }
  return matches.reduce(function (best, c) {
    var bestArea = (best.bbox[2] - best.bbox[0]) * (best.bbox[3] - best.bbox[1]);
    var cArea = (c.bbox[2] - c.bbox[0]) * (c.bbox[3] - c.bbox[1]);
    return cArea < bestArea ? c : best;
  });
}

  var _EMERGENCY_DB$find;
  return (_EMERGENCY_DB$find = EMERGENCY_DB.find(function (c) {
    return c.code === code;
  })) != null ? _EMERGENCY_DB$find : EMERGENCY_DB[EMERGENCY_DB.length - 1];
}

export function resolveKmMarker(highway, km) {
  var normalised = highway.replace(/\s/g, '').toUpperCase();
  var exactKey = `${normalised}-${km}`;
  if (KM_MARKER_DB[exactKey]) return KM_MARKER_DB[exactKey];
  var roundedKm = Math.round(km / 10) * 10;
  var roundedKey = `${normalised}-${roundedKm}`;
  if (KM_MARKER_DB[roundedKey]) return _objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, KM_MARKER_DB[roundedKey]), {}, {
    km: km
  });
  var hwVariants = [normalised, normalised.replace('NH', 'NH-'), normalised.replace('NH-', 'NH')];
  for (var hw of hwVariants) {
    var key = `${hw}-${roundedKm}`;
    if (KM_MARKER_DB[key]) return _objectSpread(_objectSpread({}, KM_MARKER_DB[key]), {}, {
      km: km
    });
  }
  return null;
}
export function getHighwayList() {
  var highways = new Set();
  Object.values(KM_MARKER_DB).forEach(function (e) {
    return highways.add(e.highway);
  });
  return Array.from(highways).sort();
}
